hero.subtitle: Upload your face, paste your video URL, and get finished thumbnails — your face plus a bold hook, baked into one image. Free to start · No credit card.

form.errorInvalid: That doesn’t look like a valid YouTube URL. Try https://youtube.com/watch?v=...
form.errorOverLimit: You’ve used all {limit} free generations. Upgrade to Pro for more.
form.urlHint: Works with youtube.com/watch, youtu.be, and Shorts links.

avatar.checkboxHint: Composes the channel's profile image into each thumbnail.

persona.label: Your face (optional)
persona.hint: Star in your own thumbnails — upload a clear photo of your face.
persona.consent: Upload only your own photo (or one you have the right to use). Without a photo, thumbnails are generated without a face.
persona.faceRejected: We couldn’t find a single clear face in that photo. Upload a clear, front-facing photo of just your face.

caption.label: Caption (optional)
caption.hint: · Auto-generated from the title if left blank

auth.signupSubtitle: 5 free thumbnails to start. No credit card.
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a confirmation link.

styles.vlog: Lifestyle / Vlog — white pill kicker + big centered sans title
styles.tech: Tech / How-to — left text panel, hero subject on the right
styles.gaming: Gaming / Manga — yellow title with thick outline + red drop shadow, "ACTION!" stamp
styles.magazine: Magazine cover — top kicker + big serif display title on a hero photo
styles.quad: Keyword spotlight — raw scene ×4 with one bold centered keyword
